metaDescription: We are Cuberack, a premium VPS and dedicated server provider specializing in high-performance AMD Ryzen-powered servers.
heroDescriptionParts: Stop babysitting infrastructure. Start shipping products or gaming servers which are actually stable.
We handle the heavy lifting, you take the glory in the work.
cookieDescription: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. By continuing to browse, you accept our use of cookies.
featuresSubtitle: Engineered for uncompromising communities and developers who demand absolute performance.

featureCards.label: PERFORMANCE
featureCards.title: Only the fastest survive
featureCards.desc: We obsess over every component so you don't have to. The result? Raw, unthrottled AMD Ryzen power.

featureCards.label: NETWORK
featureCards.title: Built to never drop
featureCards.desc: Redundant premium transit paths and a high-capacity backbone that laughs at congestion. Your packets take the fast lane.

featureCards.label: SECURITY
featureCards.title: Attacks hit. You don't notice.
featureCards.desc: Enterprise-grade multi-layer DDoS mitigation that eats massive attacks for breakfast. Sleep easy while we defend your uptime.

featureCards.label: SUPPORT
featureCards.title: Replies so fast it feels unfair
featureCards.desc: No AI chatbots or endless runarounds. Connect instantly with technical experts who actually know server infrastructure.
